reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para hacer un alto en el viaje, amplio espacio para distenderse y distraerse un rato. Está bien surtido de alimentos, bebidas y snacks.
La atención es rápida y buena, marca registrada de las estaciones de servicio del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to stop during your trip, with plenty of space to relax and unwind. It's well-stocked with food, drinks, and snacks.
The service is quick and good, a hallmark of ACA service stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVM3ZxSWdRRRAB
